faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants in my Ossining home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include piles of wood shavings (frass) near baseboards or windowsills, rustling sounds inside walls, and large black ants appearing indoors, especially in spring. You may also notice hollow-sounding wood or damaged structural timbers in basements and attics.

faqs.question: What determines the cost of carpenter ant control in Ossining?
faqs.answer: Pricing between $350 and $2,000 depends on factors like the size of your home, number of colonies, extent of infestation, accessibility of nesting areas, and whether multiple treatments are needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to carpenter ant problems in Ossining?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for most Ossining locations. Carpenter ant infestations worsen over time, so prompt treatment is essential to prevent structural damage. Contact us today and we'll schedule your inspection as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: Are your carpenter ant treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and targeted application methods that effectively eliminate carpenter ants while minimizing exposure to people and pets. Our technicians follow strict safety protocols and will provide you with specific guidelines for your home during and after treatment.
